title: Add additional storage with test image
body:
This patch adds an overlay storage with a testimg based on alpine
already installed.  I also modified kpod_history.bats to no longer
pull images, but to use the test image.  This should speed up the
testing process, since we don't have to constantly pull images.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: This breaks if we ever change how we store things in overlay, and assumes we're using overlay, which isn't always the case during testing.  Can we grab the copyimg test helper from cri-o, and use it to save a freshly-pulled copy of the image to a secondary location, restoring it from there instead of pulling it if we see that location populated?

Sure we can look to do this, but I guess I would like to be able to test to make sure the additonalstores stuff works also.  Perhaps we should just add tests cases for it, and only run them if overlay back end is used.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably d2eda1a) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@rhatdan I think we can close this one ?
I actually want to add a tests for this, but we need to close it for its orignal purpose, yes.
